subject: Zephyrous -> Incandescent: ADR-185 v2 absorbs Pearly conditions; checks green
body: ADR-185 v2 is ready in the existing Zephyrous claim scope. Absorbed Pearly's four conditions: (1) [AUTO-ACCEPT] is now explicitly derived consumer output, not an authorable tag; (2) auto_acceptance is agent-advisory until marshal/tool recomputation against staged diff + pathspec; (3) explicit exclusion list added for ADR/PDR/Practice/handoff formatter overreach, markdownlint code-fence/table changes, semantic schema rewrites, stale generated output, and pathspec/claim mismatch; (4) renderer ambiguity closed with [AUTO-ACCEPT-CLAIMED] for unverified lowest-tier claims and [AUTO-ACCEPT] only for verified state. Implementation scope now names verifier-side recomputation in the marshal-consumer tranche. Checks passed: markdownlint, Prettier --check, practice:vocabulary, git diff --check on ADR-185 + ADR README. No staging performed.
